programme.title: The Premier League's Greatest Games
programme.desc: A chance to relive a Premier League classic. Here, Manchester United host rivals Liverpool at Old Trafford back in 2009 in match that saw five goals.

programme.desc: A fierce rivalry renewed with Champions League qualification the aim for both, Manchester United and Liverpool lock horns again on a huge Super Sunday at Old Trafford.

programme.title: Mo Salah: When He Was King
Premier League Stories
programme.desc: We speak to Dimitar Berbatov, a player whose elegance and composure left a lasting imprint on English football. Focusing on his Premier League years, we follow his rise at Tottenham Hotspur, where his effortless style first captivated fans, through to his trophy-laden spell at Manchester United, where moments of brilliance were often matched by intense scrutiny.

programme.title: The Big Interview
programme.desc: Tammy Abraham details the pain of being let go by Chelsea, what happened when he scored against Roma whilst on loan at Milan and his hopes of getting Villa back into the Champions League.
